title: Basic Memoization
description: Implement a basic memoization wrapper for pure functions using a HashMap cache.

complexity.time: O(1) cache hit, O(f) cache miss

requirements: Struct must be named 'Memoize<F, K, V>'
Accept a function F: Fn(K) -> V
Implement call(&mut self, key: K) -> V
Key type must be Hash + Eq + Clone
Cache hits should not re-call function
